hero.description: We believe in the power of precision and collaboration. Join thousands of developers building the future of clean, automated HTML scaffolding. Every line of code counts.

supportChannels.title: Support Channels
supportChannels.description: Whether you're stuck on a bug or looking for architectural advice, our community is here to help you move faster.

items.title: Discord
items.description: Join our vibrant real-time chat for quick questions, community hangouts, and live announcements.

items.title: GitHub Issues
items.description: Found a bug or have a feature request? Open an issue on our repository to track progress.

items.title: StackOverflow
items.description: Browse the Q&A archive or ask a specific technical question using the custom tag.

contributing.title: Start contributing today
contributing.description: New to open source? No problem. We have a dedicated path for beginners to help you make your first pull request.
contributing.code:
git clone https://github.com/cucumber-html.git
cd mchr
npm install
npm run dev

spotlight.title: Community Spotlight
spotlight.description: Recognizing the incredible individuals who dedicate their time to making CucumberHTML better for everyone.

events.title: Monthly Community Sync
events.description: Join the core team to discuss the Q1 roadmap and new architectural changes.

events.title: Hack-the-December 2024
events.description: A 40-hour global hackathon focused on building ecosystem plugins.

updates.title: CucumberHTML v4.2.0 "Emerald" is here
updates.description: Improved tree-shaking and full support for the new design system primitives.

updates.title: Scaling Documentation with Asymmetry
updates.description: How we used precision duration to overhaul our technical guides.
